description: An introduction to regression with emphasis on the practical aspects. Topics include: straight-line model, role of assumptions, residual analysis, transformations, multiple regression (with some use of matrix notation), multicollinearity, subset selection, and a brief introduction to mixed models.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (STAT 240,301, 302,312,324,371,ECON 310,B M E 325, orI SY E 210) and (STAT 327 or303, or concurrent enrollment)
